caption: The video features a woman sitting in what appears to be a podcast studio, as indicated by the "Boss Talk 101 Podcast" logo visible on the screen. She is wearing headphones and is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting she is either hosting or participating in a podcast episode. The woman has her hair styled in an updo and is dressed casually in a black t-shirt. Behind her, there is a television screen displaying the name "Johnson," which might be related to the content of the podcast. The setting includes a white wall and a black door with a yellow frame, contributing to a professional yet relaxed atmosphere. Throughout the video, the woman seems engaged and attentive, possibly listening to someone off-camera or preparing to speak.
